ast.name: RaffleRoundV9Mainnet

structs.name: RefundState

functions.name: blockHash

data.name: header
data.span: byte[] header = before_daa + byte[](byte[8](daa_score)) + byte[](byte[8](blue_score)) + encoded_blue_work + byte[](pruning_point);

functions.name: merkleRoot
buy

data.then_span:
next_frontier = next_frontier.slice(0, start) + byte[](node) + next_frontier.slice(start + 32, 640);
                        carrying = false;

data.else_span:
sibling = byte[32](frontier.slice(start, start + 32));
                    node = sha256(byte[](sibling) + byte[](node));

data.name: validateOutputState

args.span:
{
            max_tickets: max_tickets,
            ticket_price: ticket_price,
            creator_pubkey: creator_pubkey,
            refund_after_daa: refund_after_daa,
            sold_tickets: sold_tickets + ticket_count,
            ticket_root: node,
            frontier: byte[640](next_frontier),
            refund_cursor: 0,
        }

functions.name: finalize

expr.span: blockHash(parent_before_daa, parent_daa, parent_blue_score, parent_blue_work, parent_pruning_point) == parent_hash

data.span: require(blockHash(parent_before_daa, parent_daa, parent_blue_score, parent_blue_work, parent_pruning_point) == parent_hash);

data.name: target_hash
data.span: byte[32] target_hash = blockHash(target_before_daa, target_daa, target_blue_score, target_blue_work, target_pruning_point);

functions.name: startRefund

data.name: next_refund

expr.span:
{
            ticket_price: ticket_price,
            creator_pubkey: creator_pubkey,
            sold_tickets: sold_tickets,
            ticket_root: ticket_root,
            refund_cursor: 0
        }
